name: wrong-plan-param
flowGoal: Selecting Pro on pricing must pass plan=pro to the checkout route.
successCondition: Checkout page shows the Pro plan total and reaches /success.

signals: Selecting Pro sends a non-pro plan query before the patch
Checkout URL contains plan=pro and the Pro total after the patch

verification.testName: wrong-plan-param: selecting Pro passes plan=pro into checkout
verification.successCondition: Selecting Pro opens checkout with plan=pro and completes to /success.
